basic_details.job_title: Keonjhar CDM&PHO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 57 Pharmacist, Staff Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Chief District Medical & Public Health Officer, Keonjhar
basic_details.post_name: Pharmacist, Staff Nurse and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Chief District Medical & Public Health Officer, Keonjhar has released the official Pharmacist, Staff Nurse and More Posts Notification 2026 on 18 May 2026 at the official website of Keonjhar district. A total of 57 vacancies have been announced under the Keonjhar CDM&PHO Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates meeting the prescribed eligibility criteria mentioned in the official notification can apply offline up to 01 June 2026. The official notification PDF and application form link are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for detailed age limit and relaxation details.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for detailed eligibility criteria for each post.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for detailed salary information for each post.

selection_process: Selection based on highest length of incumbency under the Society as per reservation category if any
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://kendujhar.odisha.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Keonjhar CDM&PHO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the various contractual posts released by the Chief District Medical & Public Health Officer, Keonjhar is 01 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: A total of 57 vacancies are available for various NHM contractual posts under the Chief District Medical & Public Health Officer, Keonjhar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Keonjhar CDM&PHO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the official website to download the application form?
faq.answer: You can download the application form from the official website of the Chief District Medical & Public Health Officer, Keonjhar, which is https://kendujhar.odisha.gov.in.

faq.question: Q6. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment drive by the Chief District Medical & Public Health Officer, Keonjhar is 1848.

faq.question: Q7. What type of job is offered in this recruitment?
faq.answer: The posts offered in this recruitment are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for these posts?
faq.answer: The job location for these posts is Keonjhar, Odisha.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process is based on the highest length of incumbency under the Society as per the reservation category, if any.

faq.question: Q10. When was the notification released?
faq.answer: The official notification for this recruitment was released on 18 May 2026.
